overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player character moves from a covered pedestrian walkway through an open plaza with towering skyscrapers, descends stairs to street level, and continues along a busy downtown sidewalk with digital billboards and heavy traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered concrete walkway with teal walls

entered.detail: concrete overhang structure with visible beams and fluorescent lighting
smooth teal-painted concrete retaining walls lining the walkway
simple concrete seating blocks with people resting
long rectangular overhead lights illuminating the covered path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered urban walkway with teal concrete walls and overhead fluorescent lighting. Several pedestrians are seated on concrete benches along the sides as the camera moves steadily forward toward an opening in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza terrace with panoramic city skyline view

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with view of futuristic skyline and tall skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking across an open plaza with benches while approaching the edge to view the cityscape

entered.detail: towering glass and steel buildings with neon accents visible in the distance
white steam or smoke rising from vents among the downtown buildings
tropical palm trees planted along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a sunlit open plaza with a dramatic view of a futuristic skyline featuring towering skyscrapers. Steam rises from distant buildings as the camera passes concrete benches and palm trees along the terrace edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: stair descent from elevated walkway to street level

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs from the elevated plaza down to street level

agents.ego_description: walking down a flight of concrete stairs with metal railings toward the street below

notable_agents.action: person walking up the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with yellow-orange metal railings descending to street level
industrial circular ventilation fan with steam emitting from nearby vents
view of the street below with vehicles and pedestrians becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and descends a wide concrete staircase with metal railings, moving from the elevated plaza down toward street level. A large industrial ventilation fan is visible on the right as the street with moving vehicles comes into view below.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with digital billboards and neon signage

events.description: reaches street level and enters busy downtown sidewalk with heavy pedestrian and vehicle traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians and storefronts with large digital displays

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large blue digital billboard displaying 'BROSEPH BREWING CO' with white text
tall vertical green sign with 'SABURO' written in white letters
elevated walkway crossing over the street connecting two buildings
multiple large LED screens displaying advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches street level and walks along a busy downtown sidewalk lined with massive digital billboards including a prominent 'Broseph Brewing' sign and a vertical 'Saburo' sign. Vehicles drive along the street to the left while pedestrians walk along the concrete sidewalk under an overhead pedestrian bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with large yellow billboards and neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various storefronts and digital displays

entered.detail: massive yellow digital screen displaying a face with product advertisement
bright neon signs including a teal 'DELI' sign on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the downtown street, passing a large yellow billboard with a face advertisement on the left and neon storefront signs on the right. The Saburo sign recedes into the distance on the left as the camera approaches another overhead walkway structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile, enclosed pedestrian corridor into the sprawling, neon-lit chaos of a futuristic downtown district. It begins within a covered walkway of teal concrete and fluorescent light, moving past seated pedestrians toward a bright opening in the distance. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the space expands into a sunlit open plaza where steam rises against a backdrop of towering skyscrapers and palm trees. The perspective then descends a wide concrete staircase past a large industrial ventilation fan, transitioning from the elevated terrace down to the bustling street level. Finally, the camera moves along a crowded sidewalk beneath an overhead bridge, passing massive digital billboards for Broseph Brewing and Saburo before continuing past neon storefronts and a large yellow advertisement.
